title: The Low Shield
description: Lowers the first-person shield model for better visibility while keeping the vanilla Minecraft style.
body:
Tired of your shield taking up too much screen space in Minecraft?

**The Low Shield** lowers the first-person shield position, giving you a clearer view during combat, exploration, and building while preserving the vanilla look and feel.

### Why You'll Love It:
✅ Better visibility while blocking and exploring  
✅ Keeps the classic vanilla Minecraft style  
✅ Simple and lightweight resource pack  
✅ No mods required – works in vanilla Minecraft  
✅ Great for survival, PvP, and content creation

### Comparison

#### Right Hand (Before vs After)
![Right Hand Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f297b3d077a30620dec24a99b273c3ad8ae891b1.gif)

#### Left Hand (Before vs After)
![Left Hand Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f172aae230f3befd9fa4f29be13e2e60277602be.gif)

Enjoy a cleaner gameplay experience with improved visibility while keeping the familiar vanilla shield appearance.
